description_long: This induction cooker features a sleek, curved rectangular body with a glossy teal finish and two prominent circular burners, each protected by sturdy black pan supports. The front panel displays the brand name 'KOKO' in bold white letters, flanked by a set of control knobs and indicator icons for each burner. The cooktop surface is smooth and slightly reflective, with metallic accents around the burners and a central raised section likely housing internal electronics. The control panel is symmetrically arranged, with tactile knobs and clearly marked icons for power and heat adjustment. The overall design is compact and modern, suitable for countertop use in urban kitchens or outdoor cooking setups. No power cord is visible, and the unit appears robust and portable, with a hard, durable exterior.
description: A glossy teal induction cooker with two burners, black pan supports, and a central control panel labeled 'KOKO'. Features tactile knobs and a modern, compact design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the 'KOKO' brand, control knobs, and both burners with black pan supports.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the unit and the circular burners aligned front to back.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the smooth back panel and the raised central section, with both burners visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the side profile and burner alignment.
attribute_control_panel_layout: The control panel is located on the front face, featuring two rotary knobs symmetrically placed on either side of the central 'KOKO' logo. Each knob is accompanied by small indicator icons for power and heat settings. No digital display is present, and the controls are tactile and clearly labeled.
